questions.question: How is an @click listener represented in the $attrs object?
What option do you set to prevent Vue from automatically forwarding fallthrough attrs to the root element?
options: Setting attrs: false in the component options

questions.question: Why can't you use a watcher to track changes to attrs returned by useAttrs()?
options: useAttrs() returns a frozen object that never updates
Watchers can only track refs and reactive objects, not attrs
useAttrs() always returns the latest values but watchers don't track it
Vue removes fallthrough attrs before the watcher runs
